title: Min Stack
input_format: A sequence of operations: push(val), pop(), top(), getMin().
output_format: Results of top() and getMin() operations.
constraints:
- `-2^31 <= val <= 2^31 - 1`
- Methods `pop`, `top` and `getMin` will always be called on non-empty stacks.
- At most `3 * 10^4` calls to push, pop, top, and getMin.
function_signature: class MinStack { push(val: number): void; pop(): void; top(): number; getMin(): number; }
